PropertyTypes.Caption: Icon
PropertyTypes.Description: If no icon is configured, a circle will be rendered.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Group Events
PropertyTypes.Description: Shows a header between grouped events based on event date.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Group Attribute
PropertyTypes.Description: Will be used for grouping events, as a group header value. If events have no date time value, use "Unscheduled events placement" to control rendering.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Group by
PropertyTypes.Description: Group events based on day, month or year.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Format
PropertyTypes.Description: Format group header with current language's format

PropertyTypes.Caption: Ungrouped events position
PropertyTypes.Description: Position in the list of events without a date and time

PropertyTypes.Caption: Tooltip position
PropertyTypes.Description: How to position the tooltip in relation to the trigger element - at the top, to the left, at the bottom or to the right.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Arrow position
PropertyTypes.Description: How to position the tooltip arrow in relation to the tooltip - at the start, in the center or at the end.

PropertyTypes.Caption: Open on
PropertyTypes.Description: How the tooltip is triggered - click, hover, hover and focus. On mobile device “hover” will be triggered on touch.
